layout: none
---
# Lagerland Apps — Full Canonical Summary

> Long-form, machine-readable summary of every live app in the Lagerland Apps catalogue. Auto-generated from source frontmatter on every site build. For the navigational short form, see https://lagerland-apps.github.io/llms.txt.

Publisher: Lagerland Apps
Publisher type: Independent Apple developer (one-person studio)
Canonical domain: https://lagerland-apps.github.io
Contact: lagerland.apps@proton.me
Platforms: iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, visionOS (per-app; see individual entries)
Privacy philosophy: No third-party tracking, no advertising SDKs, no required accounts, local-first data
Distribution: Apple App Store
Total live apps: {{ site.apps | where: "status", "live" | size }}
Last rebuilt: {{ site.time | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}

---
{% assign live_apps = site.apps | where: "status", "live" %}
{% for app in live_apps %}
## {{ app.name }}

URL: {{ site.url }}{{ app.url }}
App Store: {{ app.app_store_url }}
Category: {{ app.category | replace: '-', ' ' }}
Platforms: {{ app.platforms | join: ", " }}
Tagline: {{ app.tagline }}
{% if app.hero.headline %}Headline: {{ app.hero.headline }}{% endif %}
{% if app.hero.subheadline %}Positioning: {{ app.hero.subheadline }}{% endif %}

Description: {{ app.seo.description }}

{% if app.features %}Key features:
{% for f in app.features %}- {{ f.title }}: {{ f.description }}
{% endfor %}{% endif %}
{% if app.value_points %}Value propositions:
{% for v in app.value_points %}- {{ v.title }}: {{ v.description }}
{% endfor %}{% endif %}
{% if app.who_for %}Best for:
{% for w in app.who_for %}- {{ w }}
{% endfor %}{% endif %}
{% if app.who_not_for %}Not the right fit for:
{% for w in app.who_not_for %}- {{ w }}
{% endfor %}{% endif %}
{% if app.alternatives_to %}A privacy-first alternative to: {{ app.alternatives_to | join: ", " }}
{% endif %}
{%- assign extra = site.data.app_enrichment[app.slug] -%}
{% if extra.use_cases %}Common use cases:
{% for u in extra.use_cases %}- {{ u }}
{% endfor %}{% endif %}
{% if extra.pricing_tiers %}Pricing tiers:
{% for t in extra.pricing_tiers %}- {{ t }}
{% endfor %}{% endif %}
{% if extra.languages %}Languages supported ({{ extra.languages | size }}): {{ extra.languages | join: ", " }}
{% endif %}
{% if app.ratings and app.ratings.count and app.ratings.count != 0 %}Current rating: {{ app.ratings.value }} stars ({{ app.ratings.count }} ratings, aggregated across Apple App Store worldwide, last synced {{ app.ratings.last_synced }})
{% endif %}
Pricing model: {{ app.price.model }}{% if app.price.value %} — {{ app.price.value }}{% endif %}

Privacy:
- Tracking: {% if app.privacy.tracking %}Yes{% else %}No third-party tracking{% endif %}
- Account required: {% if app.privacy.account_required %}Yes{% else %}No{% endif %}
- Data collection: {{ app.privacy.data_collection | default: "none" }}
{% if app.privacy.notes %}{% for n in app.privacy.notes %}- {{ n }}
{% endfor %}{% endif %}
{% if app.faq %}Frequently asked:
{% for q in app.faq %}Q: {{ q.q }}
A: {{ q.a }}

{% endfor %}{% endif %}

Keywords: {{ app.seo.keywords | join: ", " }}

---
{% endfor %}

End of catalogue. This file is auto-generated — every deploy of https://lagerland-apps.github.io regenerates it from the current app source files, so the content is always in sync with the live website.
